prophecies.q: 帕拉塞尔苏斯论农民起义
prophecies.a: 农民将揭竿而起，反抗领主和教会的双重压迫。他们的暴动将席卷日耳曼南部，但最终会被血腥镇压。然而这场起义的种子不会死去，它将在未来的世纪中反复发芽。
prophecies.q_en: Paracelsus on peasant rebellions
prophecies.a_en: Peasants will rise up against the dual oppression of lords and the Church. Their revolt will sweep through southern Germany but will ultimately be bloodily suppressed. Yet the seeds of this uprising will not die — they will sprout repeatedly in future centuries.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 1524-1525年德意志农民战争确实爆发于日耳曼南部，约10万农民被杀。起义虽被镇压，但农民运动精神延续至后世的社会革命运动。
prophecies.verdict_en: The German Peasants' War of 1524-1525 did erupt in southern Germany, with approximately 100,000 peasants killed. Though suppressed, the spirit of peasant movements continued into later social revolutions.
prophecies.yearReason: 帕拉塞尔苏斯描述了当时正在发生的农民战争
prophecies.yearReason_en: Paracelsus described the peasant wars occurring in his time

prophecies.q: 帕拉塞尔苏斯论宗教改革的未来
prophecies.a: 教会将经历大分裂，旧有的教条将被推翻，新的信仰形式将在日耳曼诸邦国中兴起。修道院将被废弃，教士将失去世俗权力。
prophecies.q_en: Paracelsus on the future of religious reformation
prophecies.a_en: The Church will undergo a great schism, old doctrines will be overthrown, and new forms of faith will arise among the German states. Monasteries will be abandoned, and clerics will lose their temporal power.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 16世纪宗教改革确实导致天主教会大分裂。1555年《奥格斯堡和约》正式承认路德宗地位。大量修道院在新教地区被废弃或没收，教士的世俗权力显著衰落。
prophecies.verdict_en: The Protestant Reformation did indeed cause a great schism in the Catholic Church. The 1555 Peace of Augsburg formally recognized Lutheranism. Numerous monasteries were abandoned or confiscated in Protestant territories, and clerical temporal power declined significantly.
prophecies.yearReason: 帕拉塞尔苏斯在预言著作中描述了该时期
prophecies.yearReason_en: Paracelsus described this period in his prophetic writings

prophecies.q: 帕拉塞尔苏斯论医学革命
prophecies.a: 医学将不再依赖古人的教条，而是通过观察自然和实验来认识疾病。矿物与化学制剂将取代传统草药，成为治病的主要手段。
prophecies.q_en: Paracelsus on the medical revolution
prophecies.a_en: Medicine will no longer rely on the dogmas of the ancients, but will understand disease through observation of nature and experiment. Minerals and chemical preparations will replace traditional herbal remedies as the primary means of treating illness.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 16-17世纪医学确实从盖伦体液学说转向实证医学。帕拉塞尔苏斯本人开创的医疗化学（iatrochemistry）学派在16世纪后期兴盛，汞、锑等矿物药物被广泛使用。17世纪科学革命进一步推动了实验医学的发展。
prophecies.verdict_en: Medicine did shift from Galenic humoral theory to empirical medicine in the 16th-17th centuries. The iatrochemistry school Paracelsus founded flourished in the late 16th century, with mineral remedies like mercury and antimony widely adopted. The 17th-century Scientific Revolution further advanced experimental medicine.
prophecies.yearReason: 帕拉塞尔苏斯在预言著作中描述了该时期
prophecies.yearReason_en: Paracelsus described this period in his prophetic writings

prophecies.q: 帕拉塞尔苏斯论欧洲战争
prophecies.a: 欧洲将陷入漫长的战争，王国之间的战火将持续数十年，日耳曼的土地将被蹂躏，百姓将流离失所。
prophecies.q_en: Paracelsus on European wars
prophecies.a_en: Europe will be engulfed in prolonged wars. Warfare between kingdoms will last decades, German lands will be ravaged, and the common people will be displaced.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 三十年战争（1618-1648）正是帕拉塞尔苏斯预言的情形。这场战争以日耳曼地区为主战场，持续30年，导致德意志地区人口损失约30%，大量平民流离失所。1648年《威斯特伐利亚和约》结束了这场浩劫。
prophecies.verdict_en: The Thirty Years' War (1618-1648) closely matches this prophecy. Fought primarily on German soil for 30 years, it caused approximately 30% population loss in German territories with massive civilian displacement. The Peace of Westphalia in 1648 ended the devastation.
prophecies.yearReason: 帕拉塞尔苏斯在预言著作中描述了该时期
prophecies.yearReason_en: Paracelsus described this period in his prophetic writings

prophecies.q: 帕拉塞尔苏斯论社会秩序的颠覆
prophecies.a: 旧有的社会等级将被颠覆，农民将反抗领主，平民将要求与贵族平等的权利。这场变革将从西方开始，席卷整个欧洲。
prophecies.q_en: Paracelsus on the overthrow of social order
prophecies.a_en: The old social hierarchy will be overturned. Peasants will rebel against lords, and commoners will demand rights equal to the nobility. This upheaval will begin in the West and sweep across all of Europe.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 1789年法国大革命正是从西方（法国）开始，推翻了封建等级制度，宣布人人平等。此后拿破仑战争将革命思想传播至整个欧洲。19世纪欧洲各国陆续爆发革命运动（1830年、1848年革命），封建贵族特权逐步被废除。
prophecies.verdict_en: The French Revolution of 1789 began in the West (France), overthrowing the feudal hierarchy and proclaiming equality. The Napoleonic Wars then spread revolutionary ideals across Europe. European revolutions followed throughout the 19th century (1830, 1848), progressively abolishing aristocratic privileges.
prophecies.yearReason: 帕拉塞尔苏斯在预言著作中描述了该时期
prophecies.yearReason_en: Paracelsus described this period in his prophetic writings

prophecies.q: 帕拉塞尔苏斯论帝国的兴衰
prophecies.a: 伟大的帝国将崩塌，新的国家将从废墟中崛起。东方将出现一个强大的帝国，挑战西方的统治地位。
prophecies.q_en: Paracelsus on the rise and fall of empires
prophecies.a_en: Great empires will crumble, and new nations will rise from the ruins. A powerful empire will emerge in the East, challenging the dominance of the West.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 19-20世纪，奥斯曼帝国、奥匈帝国、俄罗斯帝国等老牌帝国相继解体。东方的日本在明治维新后迅速崛起，1905年日俄战争中击败俄国，成为首个击败欧洲列强的亚洲国家，标志着东方力量对西方统治的挑战。
prophecies.verdict_en: In the 19th-20th centuries, old empires including the Ottoman, Austro-Hungarian, and Russian empires collapsed. Japan rose rapidly after the Meiji Restoration and defeated Russia in the 1905 Russo-Japanese War, becoming the first Asian nation to defeat a European power, symbolizing the Eastern challenge to Western dominance.
prophecies.yearReason: 帕拉塞尔苏斯在预言著作中描述了该时期
prophecies.yearReason_en: Paracelsus described this period in his prophetic writings

prophecies.q: 帕拉塞尔苏斯论自然灾害
prophecies.a: 大地将震动，洪水将淹没城镇，瘟疫将反复侵袭人类。这些灾难是自然对人类贪婪的惩罚。
prophecies.q_en: Paracelsus on natural disasters
prophecies.a_en: The earth will tremble, floods will inundate towns, and plagues will repeatedly afflict humanity. These calamities are nature's punishment for human greed.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 地震、洪水和瘟疫确实在数百年间反复出现。仅21世纪就经历了2004年印度洋海啸（23万人死亡）、2010年海地地震（约22万人死亡）、2020年新冠大流行（全球超600万人死亡）等重大灾难。预言过于笼统但大方向应验。
prophecies.verdict_en: Earthquakes, floods, and plagues have indeed recurred over centuries. The 21st century alone saw the 2004 Indian Ocean tsunami (230,000 deaths), 2010 Haiti earthquake (~220,000 deaths), and COVID-19 pandemic (over 6 million deaths globally). The prophecy is vague but directionally accurate.
prophecies.yearReason: 帕拉塞尔苏斯在预言著作中描述了该时期
prophecies.yearReason_en: Paracelsus described this period in his prophetic writings

prophecies.q: 帕拉塞尔苏斯论知识的传播
prophecies.a: 知识将不再被少数人垄断。一种奇妙的技艺将使书籍可以无限复制，学问将传遍天下，人人皆可成为学者。
prophecies.q_en: Paracelsus on the spread of knowledge
prophecies.a_en: Knowledge will no longer be monopolized by the few. A wondrous craft will enable books to be copied without limit; learning will spread throughout the world, and everyone may become a scholar.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 古腾堡在1440年代发明的活字印刷术在帕拉塞尔苏斯的时代已开始普及。到16世纪末，欧洲印刷出版业蓬勃发展，识字率显著提高。此后知识传播不断加速——从印刷术到互联网，知识确实不再被少数人垄断。
prophecies.verdict_en: Gutenberg's movable type printing, invented in the 1440s, was already spreading in Paracelsus's time. By the late 16th century, European publishing flourished and literacy rates rose significantly. Knowledge dissemination has only accelerated since — from printing press to the internet — knowledge is no longer monopolized by the few.
prophecies.yearReason: 帕拉塞尔苏斯在预言著作中描述了该时期
prophecies.yearReason_en: Paracelsus described this period in his prophetic writings

prophecies.q: 帕拉塞尔苏斯论末世之战
prophecies.a: 在末世来临之前，将有一场席卷全球的大战。各国将使用前所未见的可怕武器，大地将被火焰和烟尘覆盖。
prophecies.q_en: Paracelsus on the apocalyptic war
prophecies.a_en: Before the end times, a great war will engulf the entire world. Nations will wield terrible weapons never seen before, and the earth will be covered in flame and smoke.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 第二次世界大战（1939-1945）是人类历史上规模最大的战争，涉及全球60多个国家。前所未见的武器——原子弹——于1945年投向广岛和长崎，造成巨大破坏。战争中的燃烧弹轰炸确实使大片土地被火焰和烟尘覆盖。
prophecies.verdict_en: World War II (1939-1945) was the largest war in human history, involving over 60 countries. Unprecedented weapons — atomic bombs — were dropped on Hiroshima and Nagasaki in 1945. Incendiary bombing campaigns did literally cover vast areas in flame and smoke.
prophecies.yearReason: 帕拉塞尔苏斯在预言著作中描述了该时期
prophecies.yearReason_en: Paracelsus described this period in his prophetic writings

prophecies.q: 帕拉塞尔苏斯论教会权力的衰落
prophecies.a: 教皇的权威将日渐衰微，世俗君主将夺取教会的财产和领地。教会最终将失去其世俗王国。
prophecies.q_en: Paracelsus on the decline of Church power
prophecies.a_en: The Pope's authority will gradually wane. Secular rulers will seize the Church's properties and territories. The Church will ultimately lose its temporal kingdom.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 1870年意大利统一运动中，意大利军队攻占罗马，教皇国正式灭亡。教皇庇护九世成为「梵蒂冈囚徒」。此前数百年间，新教改革和世俗化运动已使教皇权威持续衰落，各国陆续没收教会财产。1929年《拉特兰条约》仅保留了梵蒂冈城国这一微型领地。
prophecies.verdict_en: In 1870, during Italian unification, Italian troops captured Rome and the Papal States were abolished. Pope Pius IX became the 'Prisoner of the Vatican'. Over preceding centuries, the Protestant Reformation and secularization had eroded papal authority, with nations confiscating Church properties. The 1929 Lateran Treaty preserved only Vatican City as a tiny remnant.
prophecies.yearReason: 帕拉塞尔苏斯在预言著作中描述了该时期
prophecies.yearReason_en: Paracelsus described this period in his prophetic writings

prophecies.q: 帕拉塞尔苏斯论财富与道德
prophecies.a: 黄金将失去其至高地位，人类将发现比黄金更有价值的东西。贸易将跨越大洋，连接世界各个角落，但财富的集中将带来新的不公。
prophecies.q_en: Paracelsus on wealth and morality
prophecies.a_en: Gold will lose its supreme status; humanity will discover things more valuable than gold. Trade will cross oceans, connecting every corner of the world, but the concentration of wealth will bring new injustice.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 全球化贸易确实连接了世界各地。20世纪金本位制被废除（1971年布雷顿森林体系终结），黄金失去了货币至高地位。与此同时，全球化带来了严重的贫富分化——截至2024年，全球最富有的1%人口拥有超过45%的全球财富。
prophecies.verdict_en: Global trade has indeed connected every corner of the world. The gold standard was abandoned in the 20th century (Bretton Woods ended 1971), and gold lost its supreme monetary status. Meanwhile, globalization has brought severe wealth inequality — as of 2024, the richest 1% own over 45% of global wealth.
prophecies.yearReason: 帕拉塞尔苏斯在预言著作中描述了该时期
prophecies.yearReason_en: Paracelsus described this period in his prophetic writings

prophecies.q: 帕拉塞尔苏斯论毒物与剂量
prophecies.a: 「万物皆毒，无物非毒。唯有剂量决定一物是否有毒。」这一原理将成为未来医药科学的基石，所有药物的使用都将基于精确的剂量控制。
prophecies.q_en: Paracelsus on poison and dosage
prophecies.a_en: "All things are poison, and nothing is without poison. The dosage alone makes it so a thing is not a poison." This principle will become the cornerstone of future pharmaceutical science, and all medicine will be based on precise dosage control.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 帕拉塞尔苏斯的剂量-反应理论成为现代毒理学和药理学的基础原则。17世纪以后的药物研发全部建立在剂量控制之上。这句名言至今被引用为毒理学第一定律。
prophecies.verdict_en: Paracelsus's dose-response theory became a foundational principle of modern toxicology and pharmacology. All drug development since the 17th century has been built on dosage control. This quote is still cited as the first law of toxicology.
prophecies.yearReason: 该原理在17世纪被医学界普遍接受
prophecies.yearReason_en: This principle became widely accepted in medicine by the 17th century

prophecies.q: 帕拉塞尔苏斯论哈布斯堡王朝的命运
prophecies.a: 强大的家族将统治欧洲数百年，但其血脉将因内部通婚而衰弱。帝国将在一场大规模战争后解体，分裂为多个民族国家。
prophecies.q_en: Paracelsus on the fate of the Habsburg dynasty
prophecies.a_en: A powerful family will rule Europe for centuries, but their bloodline will weaken through intermarriage. The empire will dissolve after a large-scale war, splitting into multiple nation-states.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 哈布斯堡王朝统治欧洲超过600年（1282-1918）。长期近亲通婚导致著名的「哈布斯堡下巴」等遗传问题。1918年一战结束后，奥匈帝国解体为奥地利、匈牙利、捷克斯洛伐克等多个民族国家。
prophecies.verdict_en: The Habsburg dynasty ruled Europe for over 600 years (1282-1918). Prolonged intermarriage caused the famous 'Habsburg jaw' and other genetic issues. After WWI in 1918, the Austro-Hungarian Empire dissolved into Austria, Hungary, Czechoslovakia, and other nation-states.
prophecies.yearReason: 帕拉塞尔苏斯预言中描述了帝国解体的时间
prophecies.yearReason_en: Paracelsus described the timeline of empire dissolution in his prophecies

prophecies.q: 帕拉塞尔苏斯论炼金术的真谛
prophecies.a: 炼金术的真正目标不是将铅变成金子，而是将自然界的物质转化为治愈人类疾病的药物。真正的哲人石是知识本身——理解自然法则的能力。
prophecies.q_en: Paracelsus on the true meaning of alchemy
prophecies.a_en: The true goal of alchemy is not to turn lead into gold, but to transform natural substances into medicines that cure human diseases. The true Philosopher's Stone is knowledge itself — the ability to understand the laws of nature.
prophecies.yearReason: 哲学理念，未设定具体时间
prophecies.yearReason_en: Philosophical concept, no specific date set

prophecies.q: 帕拉塞尔苏斯论大洪水与天象
prophecies.a: 当土星、木星和火星在同一星座汇合时，大洪水将再次降临。水将淹没低地，城市将被摧毁，数百万人流离失所。
prophecies.q_en: Paracelsus on great floods and celestial signs
prophecies.a_en: When Saturn, Jupiter, and Mars conjoin in the same constellation, a great flood will come again. Water will inundate lowlands, cities will be destroyed, and millions will be displaced.
prophecies.yearReason: 帕拉塞尔苏斯未确定具体时间，以天象为征兆
prophecies.yearReason_en: Paracelsus did not specify a date, using celestial signs as omens

prophecies.q: 帕拉塞尔苏斯论东方的威胁
prophecies.a: 来自东方的大军将越过多瑙河入侵欧洲。他们将攻克维也纳附近的城市，欧洲将陷入恐慌。但最终欧洲将团结起来击退入侵者。
prophecies.q_en: Paracelsus on the threat from the East
prophecies.a_en: A great army from the East will cross the Danube and invade Europe. They will conquer cities near Vienna, and Europe will be gripped by panic. But ultimately Europe will unite to repel the invaders.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 1683年奥斯曼帝国大军围攻维也纳，15万土耳其军队兵临城下。欧洲基督教国家组成联军，在维也纳之战中击败奥斯曼军队，成为欧洲历史的转折点。
prophecies.verdict_en: In 1683, the Ottoman Empire besieged Vienna with 150,000 troops. European Christian nations formed an alliance and defeated the Ottoman army at the Battle of Vienna, a turning point in European history.
prophecies.yearReason: 帕拉塞尔苏斯预言中暗示了该时期
prophecies.yearReason_en: Paracelsus implied this period in his prophecies

prophecies.q: 帕拉塞尔苏斯论三位伟大的异端
prophecies.a: 三位伟大的异端者将改变世界的宗教面貌：第一位已经出现（路德），第二位将在南方兴起，第三位将在遥远的未来重塑所有信仰。
prophecies.q_en: Paracelsus on three great heretics
prophecies.a_en: Three great heretics will change the religious landscape of the world: the first has already appeared (Luther), the second will arise in the South, and the third will reshape all faiths in the distant future.
prophecies.yearReason: 第三位异端的时间未确定
prophecies.yearReason_en: The third heretic's timeframe is unspecified

prophecies.q: 帕拉塞尔苏斯论金属的医疗价值
prophecies.a: 汞、锑、铁、铜——这些金属中蕴含着治愈人类疾病的巨大力量。未来的医者将学会精确使用这些金属制剂，它们的药效将远超任何草药。
prophecies.q_en: Paracelsus on the medicinal value of metals
prophecies.a_en: Mercury, antimony, iron, copper — these metals contain immense power to cure human diseases. Future physicians will learn to use these metallic preparations precisely, and their efficacy will far exceed any herbal remedy.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 金属药物在现代医学中广泛应用：铂类药物（顺铂）用于癌症化疗，锂盐用于双相障碍治疗，铁剂用于贫血，银化合物用于抗菌。帕拉塞尔苏斯开创的医疗化学为这一切奠定了基础。
prophecies.verdict_en: Metal-based medicines are widely used in modern medicine: platinum drugs (cisplatin) for cancer chemotherapy, lithium salts for bipolar disorder, iron supplements for anemia, silver compounds for antibacterial use. Paracelsus's iatrochemistry laid the foundation for all of this.
prophecies.yearReason: 金属药物被系统性应用的大致时间
prophecies.yearReason_en: Approximate period when metallic medicines were systematically applied

prophecies.q: 帕拉塞尔苏斯论教育改革
prophecies.a: 学校不应只教授古人的著作，而应让学生亲自观察自然、进行实验。经验和实践是真正的教师，书本知识不过是死去的文字。
prophecies.q_en: Paracelsus on educational reform
prophecies.a_en: Schools should not merely teach the works of the ancients, but should let students observe nature firsthand and conduct experiments. Experience and practice are the true teachers — book knowledge is merely dead letters.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 17-18世纪启蒙运动推动了实验教育改革。弗朗西斯·培根的实证主义、洛克的经验主义教育理论都呼应了帕拉塞尔苏斯的理念。现代科学教育以实验和观察为核心，完全实现了他的主张。
prophecies.verdict_en: The 17th-18th century Enlightenment drove experimental educational reform. Francis Bacon's empiricism and Locke's experiential education theory echoed Paracelsus's ideas. Modern science education, centered on experiment and observation, fully realized his vision.
prophecies.yearReason: 启蒙运动教育改革的关键时期
prophecies.yearReason_en: Key period of Enlightenment educational reform

prophecies.q: 帕拉塞尔苏斯论人体内的微观宇宙
prophecies.a: 人体是宇宙的缩影。人体中包含了天上星辰的所有元素和力量。理解人体就是理解宇宙，治愈人体就是与宇宙达成和谐。
prophecies.q_en: Paracelsus on the microcosm within the human body
prophecies.a_en: The human body is a microcosm of the universe. It contains all elements and forces of the celestial stars. Understanding the body is understanding the universe; healing the body is achieving harmony with the cosmos.
prophecies.yearReason: 哲学理念，未设定具体时间
prophecies.yearReason_en: Philosophical concept, no specific date set

prophecies.q: 帕拉塞尔苏斯论外科手术的进步
prophecies.a: 外科手术将不再是粗暴的截肢和烙烫。未来的外科医生将能精确地修复人体内部器官，手术将变得像工匠雕刻一样精细。
prophecies.q_en: Paracelsus on the advancement of surgery
prophecies.a_en: Surgery will no longer be brutal amputation and cauterization. Future surgeons will be able to precisely repair internal organs, and surgery will become as refined as an artisan's carving.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 19世纪麻醉术（1846年乙醚）和消毒术（1867年李斯特）的发明彻底改变了外科手术。20世纪微创手术、器官移植、显微手术等技术使外科达到了极高的精确度。
prophecies.verdict_en: The 19th-century inventions of anesthesia (1846, ether) and antisepsis (1867, Lister) revolutionized surgery. 20th-century minimally invasive surgery, organ transplants, and microsurgery achieved extraordinary precision.
prophecies.yearReason: 现代外科手术体系形成的大致时间
prophecies.yearReason_en: Approximate period when modern surgical systems formed

prophecies.q: 帕拉塞尔苏斯论法兰西的动荡
prophecies.a: 法兰西将经历一场翻天覆地的革命。国王将失去头颅，贵族将被推翻，新的秩序将从混乱中诞生。但这个新秩序也将带来新的暴政。
prophecies.q_en: Paracelsus on the turmoil of France
prophecies.a_en: France will undergo an earth-shattering revolution. The king will lose his head, the nobility will be overthrown, and a new order will be born from chaos. But this new order will also bring new tyranny.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 1789年法国大革命爆发，1793年路易十六被送上断头台。贵族制度被废除，但随后雅各宾专政的恐怖统治和拿破仑的独裁证实了「新暴政」的预言。
prophecies.verdict_en: The French Revolution erupted in 1789; Louis XVI was guillotined in 1793. The aristocratic system was abolished, but the subsequent Reign of Terror and Napoleon's dictatorship confirmed the prophecy of 'new tyranny'.
prophecies.yearReason: 帕拉塞尔苏斯预言中暗示了该事件的时间
prophecies.yearReason_en: Paracelsus implied the timing of this event in his prophecies

prophecies.q: 帕拉塞尔苏斯论瘟疫的周期
prophecies.a: 瘟疫将以周期性方式反复降临人间。每当人类的贪婪和罪恶达到顶峰，自然就会通过疾病来净化。新的瘟疫将比黑死病更加可怕。
prophecies.q_en: Paracelsus on the cycles of plague
prophecies.a_en: Plagues will return cyclically. Whenever human greed and sin reach their peak, nature will purify through disease. New plagues will be more terrible than the Black Death.
prophecies.yearReason: 预言描述周期性事件，未设定具体时间
prophecies.yearReason_en: Prophecy describes cyclical events without specific timing

prophecies.q: 帕拉塞尔苏斯论灵魂的不朽与转化
prophecies.a: 灵魂不会消亡，只是转化形态。如同金属在炼金炉中经历死亡与重生，人的灵魂也在世间的苦难中得到锤炼和升华。
prophecies.q_en: Paracelsus on the immortality and transformation of the soul
prophecies.a_en: The soul does not perish, it merely transforms. Just as metals undergo death and rebirth in the alchemical furnace, the human soul is refined and elevated through worldly suffering.
prophecies.yearReason: 哲学理念，未设定具体时间
prophecies.yearReason_en: Philosophical concept, no specific date set

prophecies.q: 帕拉塞尔苏斯论北方强国的崛起
prophecies.a: 一个北方的国家将从贫穷和严寒中崛起，成为令整个欧洲颤抖的强权。这个国家将用铁腕统治广袤的土地，其军队将踏遍欧洲大陆。
prophecies.q_en: Paracelsus on the rise of a northern power
prophecies.a_en: A nation in the north will rise from poverty and harsh cold to become a power that makes all of Europe tremble. This nation will rule vast lands with an iron fist, and its armies will march across the European continent.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 俄罗斯帝国在彼得大帝（1682-1725年在位）领导下迅速崛起。1700年北方战争开始，俄罗斯击败瑞典成为欧洲强权。此后俄军多次深入欧洲大陆——拿破仑战争和两次世界大战。
prophecies.verdict_en: The Russian Empire rapidly rose under Peter the Great (r. 1682-1725). The Great Northern War began in 1700, with Russia defeating Sweden to become a European power. Russian armies subsequently marched deep into Europe during the Napoleonic Wars and both World Wars.
prophecies.yearReason: 俄罗斯帝国崛起的关键时间节点
prophecies.yearReason_en: Key timeline of the Russian Empire's rise

prophecies.q: 帕拉塞尔苏斯论隐秘的自然力量
prophecies.a: 自然界中存在着肉眼看不见的力量。这些力量支配着万物的生长、衰亡和转化。未来的智者将学会驾驭这些不可见的力量，创造出前人无法想象的奇迹。
prophecies.q_en: Paracelsus on hidden forces of nature
prophecies.a_en: There exist invisible forces in nature that govern the growth, decay, and transformation of all things. Future sages will learn to harness these invisible forces and create miracles unimaginable to their predecessors.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 19世纪电磁学（法拉第、麦克斯韦）和放射性（居里夫人）的发现揭示了肉眼不可见的自然力量。电力、无线电、X射线等技术彻底改变了人类文明，实现了帕拉塞尔苏斯所言的「前人无法想象的奇迹」。
prophecies.verdict_en: 19th-century discoveries in electromagnetism (Faraday, Maxwell) and radioactivity (Curie) revealed invisible natural forces. Electricity, radio, X-rays and other technologies transformed civilization, achieving Paracelsus's 'miracles unimaginable to predecessors'.
prophecies.yearReason: 不可见力量被科学发现的大致时期
prophecies.yearReason_en: Approximate period when invisible forces were scientifically discovered

prophecies.q: 帕拉塞尔苏斯论以利亚的预言
prophecies.a: 伟大的以利亚将在末世再次降临。他将揭示被隐藏的一切真理，完成未完成的炼金术大业。在他来之前，世界将经历前所未有的苦难和混乱。
prophecies.q_en: Paracelsus on the prophecy of Elijah
prophecies.a_en: The great Elijah will come again in the end times. He will reveal all hidden truths and complete the unfinished great work of alchemy. Before his coming, the world will experience unprecedented suffering and chaos.
prophecies.yearReason: 末世预言，未设定具体时间
prophecies.yearReason_en: End times prophecy, no specific date set

prophecies.q: 帕拉塞尔苏斯论万物皆毒的智慧
prophecies.a: 未来的医者将发现，万物皆含毒性，但善用之则可治病救人。毒物将被精确控制用量，成为最有效的药物。
prophecies.q_en: Paracelsus on the wisdom of 'all things are poison'
prophecies.a_en: Future physicians will discover that all things contain toxicity, but properly used they can cure illness. Poisons will be precisely dosed and become the most effective medicines.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 帕拉塞尔苏斯的「剂量决定毒性」原则成为现代毒理学和药理学的基石。19-20世纪，砷化合物（如洒尔佛散治梅毒）、放射性同位素（放疗治癌症）等有毒物质在精确控制剂量后成为有效药物，完全印证了这一预言。
prophecies.verdict_en: Paracelsus's 'the dose makes the poison' principle became the cornerstone of modern toxicology and pharmacology. In the 19th-20th centuries, toxic substances like arsenic compounds (Salvarsan for syphilis) and radioactive isotopes (radiation therapy for cancer) became effective medicines through precise dosing, fully validating this prophecy.
prophecies.yearReason: 帕拉塞尔苏斯在预言著作中描述了该时期
prophecies.yearReason_en: Paracelsus described this period in his prophetic writings

prophecies.q: 帕拉塞尔苏斯论炼金术的真谛
prophecies.a: 真正的炼金术不在于将铅变成金，而在于净化人的灵魂。未来人类将发现物质转化的奥秘，但这将通过自然哲学而非魔法实现。
prophecies.q_en: Paracelsus on the true meaning of alchemy
prophecies.a_en: True alchemy is not about turning lead into gold, but about purifying the human soul. Humanity will discover the secrets of material transmutation, but through natural philosophy rather than magic.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 1919年卢瑟福通过核反应首次实现了元素嬗变（氮转化为氧），证实了物质转化的可能性。这完全通过科学（自然哲学）而非魔法实现。现代核物理学确实可以将铅转化为金（通过粒子加速器），只是成本远超黄金价值。
prophecies.verdict_en: In 1919, Rutherford achieved the first artificial nuclear transmutation (nitrogen to oxygen), proving material transmutation was possible. This was achieved entirely through science (natural philosophy), not magic. Modern nuclear physics can indeed convert lead to gold (via particle accelerators), though the cost far exceeds gold's value.
prophecies.yearReason: 帕拉塞尔苏斯在预言著作中描述了该时期
prophecies.yearReason_en: Paracelsus described this period in his prophetic writings

prophecies.q: 帕拉塞尔苏斯论人造生命
prophecies.a: 人类将学会在容器中培育生命，不需要母体的孕育。这种「瓶中人」（Homunculus）将是炼金术的最高成就。
prophecies.q_en: Paracelsus on artificial life
prophecies.a_en: Humans will learn to cultivate life in vessels, without the need for a mother's womb. This 'Homunculus' (being in a bottle) will be the highest achievement of alchemy.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 1978年世界首例试管婴儿路易斯·布朗诞生，实现了在「容器」（培养皿）中受精培育生命。2023年以色列科学家成功用人工子宫培育小鼠胚胎。然而完全脱离母体的「瓶中人」尚未实现，体外胚胎培育仍处于早期阶段。
prophecies.verdict_en: The world's first IVF baby, Louise Brown, was born in 1978, achieving fertilization in a 'vessel' (petri dish). In 2023, Israeli scientists grew mouse embryos in artificial wombs. However, a complete 'Homunculus' independent of a mother's body has not been achieved; ex-vivo embryo development remains in early stages.
prophecies.yearReason: 帕拉塞尔苏斯在预言著作中描述了该时期
prophecies.yearReason_en: Paracelsus described this period in his prophetic writings

prophecies.q: 帕拉塞尔苏斯论人体的奥秘
prophecies.a: 人体内蕴藏着宇宙的缩影。未来的医者将能够解读人体内部的微观世界，发现疾病的根源不在体液，而在更微小的物质之中。
prophecies.q_en: Paracelsus on the mysteries of the human body
prophecies.a_en: The human body contains a microcosm of the universe. Future physicians will be able to read the microscopic world within, discovering that the root of disease lies not in humors but in far smaller substances.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 19世纪微生物学革命证实了疾病的根源在于「更微小的物质」——细菌和病毒。巴斯德（1860年代）和科赫（1880年代）的研究推翻了体液学说，确立了病菌致病理论。显微镜技术使人类得以观察人体内部的微观世界。
prophecies.verdict_en: The 19th-century microbiology revolution confirmed that disease originates in 'far smaller substances' — bacteria and viruses. Pasteur (1860s) and Koch (1880s) overthrew humoral theory and established germ theory. Microscope technology enabled observation of the microscopic world within the human body.
prophecies.yearReason: 帕拉塞尔苏斯在预言著作中描述了该时期
prophecies.yearReason_en: Paracelsus described this period in his prophetic writings

prophecies.q: 帕拉塞尔苏斯论黄金时代的到来
prophecies.a: 在经历漫长的黑暗与苦难之后，人类将迎来一个黄金时代。人们将重新发现自然的奥秘，灵魂与物质将达到和谐。这个时代将在遥远的未来降临。
prophecies.q_en: Paracelsus on the coming Golden Age
prophecies.a_en: After enduring a long period of darkness and suffering, humanity will enter a Golden Age. People will rediscover the secrets of nature, and spirit and matter will achieve harmony. This age will come in the distant future.
